description.en: Visa is a global payments technology company and card network that enables electronic funds transfers through Visa-branded credit, debit, prepaid, and contactless cards, and provides payment processing and related services through its network.

integration_methods.title: Card network acceptance (via acquirer/processor)
integration_methods.description: Accept Visa cards through a payment gateway/processor and acquiring bank; typical integration uses a PSP API or hosted checkout rather than integrating directly with Visa APIs.

integration_methods.title: Visa Developer Platform APIs
integration_methods.description: Integrate with Visa APIs for services such as tokenization, risk and security, transaction controls, and other programmatic capabilities available on the Visa Developer Platform.

features.title: Global card network
features.description: Enables acceptance of Visa-branded payment cards worldwide across in-store, online, and mobile channels.

features.title: Credit, debit, prepaid and contactless
features.description: Supports multiple card product types including EMV chip and contactless (NFC) payments.

features.title: Security and fraud controls
features.description: Provides security programs and services such as EMV, tokenization, and additional authentication programs (availability depends on region and acquirer/issuer).

features.title: Dispute/chargeback framework
features.description: Operates network rules and processes for chargebacks and disputes (handled operationally by acquirers/issuers and merchants).

products.title: VisaNet
products.description: Visa’s global processing network for routing, authorization, clearing and settlement of Visa transactions.

products.title: Visa Developer Platform
products.description: Developer portal offering APIs and tools for building on Visa’s platform.

products.title: Visa Token Service
products.description: Network tokenization service for substituting card numbers with tokens for digital payments (availability depends on issuer, wallet, and region).

products.title: Visa Secure
products.description: Program for EMV 3-D Secure to support cardholder authentication in e-commerce (implementation typically via acquirer/PSP).

api_fields.description: Identifier issued by an acquirer/processor for a merchant account when accepting Visa (field name varies by provider).
Identifier for a payment terminal or acceptance location (field name varies by acquirer/processor).
Identifier for the acquiring institution in card processing flows (field name varies by integration).
Primary Account Number (card number); typically not handled directly when using tokenization/hosted payment fields.
Payment token representing card details in tokenized transactions (format varies by token service and PSP).

playbooks.title: Accept Visa cards online via a PSP
steps: Choose a payment service provider (PSP) and acquiring setup that supports Visa acceptance.
Implement hosted checkout or payment fields and enable 3-D Secure (Visa Secure/EMV 3DS) as required.
Complete PCI DSS obligations appropriate to your integration (often reduced with hosted/tokenized solutions).
Test authorization, capture, refunds, and dispute workflows in the PSP sandbox before going live.
